channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 78 Brondesbury Villas, 17th April
item.description:
A table and kids toys have been dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Lime bike dumped in Dulwich Woods, 17th April
item.description:
Lime bike dumped in Dulwich Woods. Under the newly reopened bridge. It's difficult to be accurate on the map, but I’m sharing a what3words address to help you find this specific location. Tap to see exactly where it is: ///above.agent.figure https://w3w.co/above.agent.figure
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cox's Walk, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip: Mattress on corner of Lavender and Malvern, 17th April
item.description:
This has appeared in the 3h since you cleared the last fly tip that I reported at the same spot. And in broad daylight. Please advise what I should do if I catch someone fly tipping. It's way way past being a joke.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue gate on market place broke, 17th April
item.description:
Residents told myself at a drop in surgery in the blue library that this blue gate is broken and needs to be fixed as this is attracting shoplifters and phone snatchers on E bikes to the area who use it as a cut through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-41, Rock Grove Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car oil, 17th April
item.description:
Dumped car waste oil

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Drive, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cleaning: the Pedestrian Swing Bridge has not been cleaned since installation, 17th April
item.description:
Cleaning is long overdue. Please clean me ! The Pedestrian Swing Bridge has not been cleaned since installation.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich Reach Swingbridge Footpath, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish along Shortlands Road, 17th April
item.description:
There seems to be lots of rubbish always along Shortlands Road - Im not sure if the bin men are not picking up the rubbish when they collect it but its everywhere
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Lots of shop front rubbish dumped, 17th April

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no. 120 Highgate Road, NW5 1PB. Jus before the bus station: Lady Somerset Road GW, 17th April
item.description:
The manhole is rocking when cars drive over it and produce a sharp/loud sound which travels into the nearby houses and keeps people awake at night. (There is another rattling manhole just up the wrote before the bus station Gordon House Road GZ. I will give the details in a separate report.) We would appreciate it if you could amend this with urgency. Kind regards, Melina

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highgate Road, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unused car on road YB07 XWH obstructing access, 17th April
item.description:
9 Riverside Road - A black BMW Car is parked here opposite our driveway for weeks, no obvious owner, looks abandoned, has damage. Is obstructing access especially for vans and larger vehicles and particularly when another car parks next to our home. Four trucks have been unable to pass yesterday and today.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Riverside Road, North Cray, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, sunken surface around drain., 17th April
item.description:
Marked up but still not repaired. Please expedite

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
